rationale: Both papers center on word-of-mouth/social-network seeding, and the cited paper contributes a core seeding framework (expansion vs. acceleration value decomposition) plus influential-targeting results that could plausibly ground the citing paper’s seeding-strategy motivation. Given this strong topical and conceptual overlap in the notes (despite only a DOI-level match and no local citation context), this is not safe to treat as an obvious incidental mention.
